github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Format: type(scope): emoji description — conventional commits spec.
Allowed types: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, build, ci, chore, revert, wip.
Subject line: max 72 characters, no period at end.
Scope is optional but recommended: e.g. (auth), (api), (config), (client), (server).
Place emoji after the colon and space: feat(auth): ✨ add OAuth flow. Emoji per type: feat=✨, fix=🐛, docs=📝, refactor=♻️, perf=⚡️, test=✅, chore=🔧, ci=👷, wip=🚧, revert=⏪, style=💄, build=📦.
Body: wrap at 200 characters per line, use bullet points (* item) for multiple changes.
Breaking changes: add 'BREAKING CHANGE: description' in the footer.
